steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage lists neighborhood type and individual fitness as factors studies emphasize, then signals with "multiple conditions and needs inform individuals' choices" that these are only some of many factors. The right answer must capture both what the examples represent and the passage's broader complexity point.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'people rarely consider these factors': Contradicts the passage, which treats these as genuinely important influences. ✗
  • Choice B — 'identified as important but merely some of many': Captures both aspects — what studies identify as influential and the text's emphasis that more factors exist. ✓
  • Choice C — 'confined to Lisbon': Narrows the claim to one location when the passage makes a general point. ✗
  • Choice D — 'misstates the text's position': Misrepresents the passage's argument about walking decisions. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
